narrative:
Chatfield Twp (precinct in Crawford County) has 469 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
